records.ety: [OE. shalmie, OF. chalemie; cf. F. chalumeau shawm, chaume haulm, stalk; all fr. L. calamus a reed, reed pipe. See Haulm, and cf. Calumet.]

defs: A wind instrument of music, formerly in use, supposed to have resembled either the clarinet or the hautboy in form.
quotes: Even from the shrillest shaum unto the cornamute.
